title: Route Requests to Correct Origin Pool by Region and Deployment Type
description:
Implement request routing logic so that tenant traffic reaches the correct regional origin pool based on deployment type (pooled vs. dedicated).

## Requirements

- Dedicated tenant requests route to the dedicated origin pool for the tenant's region
- Pooled host requests route to the pooled origin pool for the request's region
- Health checks and failover policy exist (load balancer or app-level) and are observable
acceptance_criteria: Dedicated tenant requests are routed to the correct dedicated origin pool
Pooled tenant requests are routed to the correct pooled origin pool
Routing respects the tenant's home region from the directory
Health check and failover mechanisms are in place and monitored
implementation_notes: Cloudflare Worker routing based on tenant directory lookup results. The Worker selects the origin pool based on the tenant's mode (pooled/dedicated) and home_region.
